title: Artifact Description / Artifact Evaluation: Why Schedule Transformations Are Not Enough: Layout Optimizations for Block-Granular I/O
description: Reproducibility artifact for the SC26 paper "Why Schedule Transformations Are Not Enough: Layout Optimizations for Block-Granular I/O". Contains all benchmarks (E0-E8), frozen paper-canonical CSV snapshots, figure regeneration drivers, and the AD/AE appendix sources needed to reproduce Figures 4 and 8-14 and the analytic cost-metric tables on Daint.Alps (GH200) and Beverin (MI300A).
